base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tourian_zone_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 metroid. Tourian — Space Pirate base. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Tourian — Space Pirate base; Metroid-infested corridors leading to Mother Brain chamber + escape-shaft. Unlocked only after both Kraid + Ridley defeated (stats register required)
